tasks.title: UX: wireframes for responsive space-tab bar + overflow dropdown
tasks.description: Produce wireframes for: (a) the tab bar at 3 / 8 / 12 / 30 spaces and at narrow widths, (b) the active-tab treatment (filled chip + bottom accent indicator + reduced inactive weight), (c) truncated label with tooltip, (d) the '+N' overflow dropdown including the filter input that appears when the list is long, and (e) the mobile (<sm) behaviour. Use the ui-ux-pro-max skill and the existing MD3 tokens in frontend/tailwind.config.js + frontend/src/index.css. Resolve Open Question Q1 (mobile: keep scroll strip vs. unify on overflow menu).
acceptance_criteria: wireframes.md covers all 5 states/screens listed above
Active-tab treatment specified with exact tokens and the accent-indicator placement (does not rely on color alone)
Truncation width and tooltip trigger condition (only when truncated) specified
Overflow dropdown spec includes the filter threshold and keyboard interaction
Q1 (mobile) is answered explicitly in the doc

tasks.title: Implement generic useOverflowItems measurement hook
tasks.description: Create frontend/src/hooks/useOverflowItems.ts implementing the contract in blueprint.md §3.3: generic over T extends {id}, ResizeObserver on the container, per-item width capture via setItemRef, greedy fit reserving reservedTrailingPx, pinnedId forced into visible, rAF/useLayoutEffect-gated recompute, and a `measuring` flag. Store-agnostic — no Prism types imported.
acceptance_criteria: Returns { containerRef, setItemRef, visible, overflow, measuring } per contract
Active/pinned item is always present in `visible` even when it would not fit
Recompute is O(n) and gated (no synchronous layout thrash on every resize event)
Cleans up the ResizeObserver on unmount
Unit tests cover: all fit, some overflow, pinned-forced-visible, zero items, container width change
>90% line coverage for the hook file

tasks.title: Extract SpaceTab component with truncation + tooltip + active accent
tasks.description: Create frontend/src/components/layout/SpaceTab.tsx per blueprint §3.3 props. Truncate the label (max-w + truncate), render shared Tooltip + title with the full name only when the name is truncated, render the kebab affordance (persistent faint on active, hover-reveal on inactive), and render the active state (filled chip + absolutely-positioned bottom accent indicator). Tailwind tokens only; reuse components/shared/Tooltip.tsx. Match the treatment T-001 specifies.
acceptance_criteria: Active tab is visually distinct via color + font-weight + bottom accent indicator
Long name is truncated and full name appears in tooltip and title; short names show no tooltip
Kebab preserves existing Edit/Delete behaviour and last-space disable guard wiring
Keeps role='tab', aria-selected, data-space-id
No inline styles; only design-system tokens

tasks.title: Implement SpaceOverflowMenu (+N dropdown with filter)
tasks.description: Create frontend/src/components/layout/SpaceOverflowMenu.tsx per blueprint §3.3. A ghost '+N' button (matching the add-space button) that opens a portal dropdown listing the overflow spaces; show a filter input when overflow count > filterThreshold (default 6); keyboard navigable (arrows/Enter/Escape); selecting calls onSelect. Reuse the ContextMenu portal/positioning pattern and the filter UX from ReferenceAutocomplete. Add data-testid='space-overflow-btn' and data-overflow-count.
acceptance_criteria: '+N' button shows the correct overflow count and has the data-* test hooks
Dropdown lists every overflow space; selecting one switches space
Filter input appears past the threshold and narrows the list as typed
Keyboard: Enter selects, Escape closes, arrows move focus; focus-visible rings present
Closes on outside click / Escape (matches ContextMenu behaviour)

tasks.title: Refactor SpaceTabs to orchestrate hook + SpaceTab + overflow menu
tasks.description: Rewire frontend/src/components/layout/SpaceTabs.tsx to use useOverflowItems(spaces, { pinnedId: activeSpaceId }), render `visible` as SpaceTab, render SpaceOverflowMenu when overflow.length>0, keep the add-space button and ContextMenu. Selecting an overflow space calls setActiveSpace + loadBoard (same as a tab). Remove overflow-x-auto/scrollbar-none on >=sm; apply the mobile fallback per T-001's Q1 answer. Preserve role='tablist' and the public no-props component API.
acceptance_criteria: Component still exported with no props; useAppStore shape unchanged
Active space is always rendered as a visible tab regardless of count
All prior behaviours preserved: switch, Edit, Delete, last-space guard, add space
No horizontal overflow on >=sm at 3/12/30 spaces
Mobile behaviour matches the resolved Q1 decision

tasks.title: Component tests for SpaceTabs / SpaceTab / SpaceOverflowMenu
tasks.description: Add Vitest + React Testing Library tests under components/layout/__tests__. Cover: active tab always visible, overflow button appears/disappears with count, switching from overflow calls setActiveSpace+loadBoard, tooltip only on truncated names, filter narrows the dropdown, kebab Edit/Delete and last-space disable. Mock useAppStore and measurement as needed.
acceptance_criteria: >90% coverage across the new/changed components
Test proves active space never lands in overflow
Test proves overflow selection switches space and reloads board
All tests pass in `cd frontend && npm test`

tasks.title: E2E: no-overflow + active-prominence + overflow-switch (Playwright)
tasks.description: Add a Playwright spec that seeds 12 and 30 spaces, sets the viewport to 1280px and to a narrow width, and asserts: (1) the tab nav has no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth <= clientWidth) on >=sm, (2) the active tab carries the active treatment and is visible, (3) clicking '+N' opens the dropdown and selecting a space switches the board, (4) long names are truncated. Run headless; screenshot on failure.
acceptance_criteria: Asserts scrollWidth <= clientWidth for the space-tabs nav at 12 and 30 spaces on >=sm
Asserts the active tab is visible and styled as active after an overflow switch
Overflow dropdown open + select + board reload verified end-to-end
Screenshots captured on failure; results recorded in test-results.json
